hero.title: Secure Secret Input
hero.subtitle: End-to-end encrypted secret delivery
hero.securityNotice: Verify the address bar and TLS certificate before entering any password, key, or credential.

form.secretPlaceholder: Paste your password, API key, or credential here

status.success: Secret delivered successfully. You may close this page.
status.expired: This request has expired. Ask the requester for a new link.
status.alreadyUsed: This request has already been fulfilled.
status.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
status.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.

validation.invalidConfirmation: Invalid confirmation code. Please check and try again.

footer.securityInfo: Your secret is encrypted in the browser before transmission. The server never has access to the plaintext.
